case_title: KWAN, RENEE K. VS THE PACIFIC BANK, N.A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KWAN, RENEE K. AS TO DEFENDANT THE PACIFIC BANK, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, RENEE K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE PACIFIC BANK, N.A. $4,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,715.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
